name: appendText
description: Appends plain text to the end of a document. For formatted content, use appendMarkdown instead.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

text.description: The plain text to append to the end of the document.

addNewlineIfNeeded.description: Automatically add a newline before the appended text if the doc doesn't end with one.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to append to. If not specified, appends to the first tab (or legacy document.body for documents without tabs).
